Text:

Ref:
Ja sam hazla 

Cunami PBR THC geng vrti Sarajevo ooo 
Flo gros patroliram ≈Γeherom
Adrese sti≈Ψem ko amazon 
Na licu osmijeh in da biznis zone
Na cosku s gengom iznad zuji dron
Lobe brado baro gori marlboro

Samo sport ooo ovo moj je sport uouuo 
Siempre pronto siempre pronto
Textil OG kush ganjamo plus
Zakucava kazaljka radijus
Ne mogu ni≈Γta pa kazne nam pi≈Γu
Evo na kafu pa odjebi U
(Hazla)

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

Od para suhe ruke tvrde od vratila
Ambicije biznisi price u kvadratima
Nista telefoni samo turska kupatila
Mala nam evropa jasemo ko Atila

Jangeri u spremi niko ne da na svoj blok
Cjevanicama punim hladno udara se ≈Γtok
Za desetoro brace mati sprema wok 
Nagazili ≈Γmekera podrum soba shock

Ljubav u mahali drama scenario
Rumeni obrazi al nije kardio

Sudbina takva ke≈Γ Ρ΅emo duplat
Kurve se ≈Ψale da neΡ΅e se udat
Dobrom se robom ko sefte lupat
Oprat ke≈Γovinu korov poΡçupat

Ref:
Ja sam hazla

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnβÄôt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneβÄôs favorite activity, but it can be very messy βÄî and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneβÄôs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonβÄôt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 βÄî The pacifier hack 

2:42 βÄî A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 βÄî The getting along/best friendsβÄô shirt 

7:20 βÄî Face mask too big? Try this hack

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
WeβÄôve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and hereβÄôs what we created. ArenβÄôt 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, letβÄôs try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts youβÄôll adore.

snippet.title: KuΡ΅a od srca S07, porodica StanΡçulj 03. PINK 14.02. 12h premijerna epizoda StanΡçulj 04
snippet.description: Projekat "KuΡ΅a od srca" ima za cilj zbrinjavanje najugro≈Ψenijih porodica na teritoriji Republike Srbije. Ministarstvo rada i socijalne politike prepoznalo je zajedniΡçke ciljeve i prikljuΡçilo se projektu βÄù KuΡ΅a od srca βÄù u pomoΡ΅i pri zadovoljavanju osnovnih potreba ugro≈Ψenih porodica. Porodice koje su deo projekta βÄù KuΡ΅a od srca βÄù uz podr≈Γku Ministarstva rada i socijalne politike imaju priliku da budu stambeno zbrinute, materijalno potpomognute, vraΡ΅ene u obrazovni sistem ≈Γto rezultira resocijalizacijom svih Ρçlanova porodice uz akcentovanje na najmlaΡëe Ρçlanove dru≈Γtva. Osnovna ideja projekta βÄù KuΡ΅a od srca βÄù jeste ukljuΡçivanje celokupne zajednice u pomoΡ΅ porodicama koje su od strane Ministarstva progla≈Γene najugro≈Ψenijim. Ono ≈Γto izdvaja serijal βÄ€KuΡ΅a od srcaβÄù, jeste Ρçinjenica da je to prvi domaΡ΅i rijaliti, koji se pored re≈Γavanja stambenog pitanja kroz graΡëevinske radove, bavi i re≈Γavanjem porodiΡçnih i meΡëuljudskih odnosa. Pravila serijala su jasno definisana i glase: 1. Izgradnja kuΡ΅e po projektu traje 31dan i ukoliko nije gotova serijal tu zavr≈Γava, objekat ostaje u zateΡçenom stanju, sa porukom da se zajedniica ukljuΡçi I pomogne u zavr≈Γetku radova. 2. Da imaju imovinu najbli≈Ψih koji su spremni da je ustupe za izgradnju KuΡ΅e od srca . 3. Najbli≈Ψi Ρçlanovi porodice, prijatelji I kom≈Γije moraju imati pozitivno mi≈Γljenje o izabranoj porodici. 4. Punoletni Ρçlanovi izabrane porodice moraju biti dru≈Γtveno odgovorni : da nisu u≈Ψivaoci alkohala, droge kao I da nisu skloni nasilju, a imaju izra≈Ψenu crtu o brizi za decu. Ukoliko bilo koji Ρçlan porodice koji je uΡçesnik serijala prekr≈Γi bilo koje pravilo, serijal se prekida istog trenutka kao I sama gradnja.

Ciao cari amici, care massaie e padroni di casa. Per gli amanti delle torte, dei formaggi, del burek, una ricetta perfetta. Semplice e facile da preparare e gustosa come in qualsiasi panetteria. β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§β•§
Ahoj milΟ≠ priatelia, milΟ© ≈Ψeny v domΟΓcnosti a hostitelia. Pre milovnΟ≠kov kolΟΓΡçov, syrov, burekov, jeden perfektnΟΫ recept. JednoduchΟΓ a ΡΨahkΟΓ prΟ≠prava a rovnako chutnΟ© ako v ka≈Ψdej pekΟΓrni. StaΡçΟ≠ postupova≈Ξ podΡΨa podrobnej prΟ≠pravy a ΟΚspech je zaruΡçenΟΫ. Plnenie mΟ¥≈Ψete zmeni≈Ξ podΡΨa va≈Γich predstΟΓv a vkusu jeho rodiny. Tak≈Ψe zaΡçnime s receptom
ZLO≈ΫKY

snippet.title: Emanet 112. BΟΕlΟΦm FragmanΡ± | Legacy Episode 112 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherβÄôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewβÄΠ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleβÄôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Emanet 113. BΟΕlΟΦm FragmanΡ± | Legacy Episode 113 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherβÄôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewβÄΠ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleβÄôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Is the Xiaomi Mi 11 Pretending? - Durability Test!
snippet.description:
Its time to durability test the new Xiaomi Mi 11. A non professional phone with a whole lot of professional parts. At 600 bucks, though its definitely worth taking a look at. Today we are going to durability test the new  Mi 11. We'll see what the Mi 11 is made of, as well as see how structurally sound the frame is under pressure. 

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/ 
*Follow me for updates!*
Instagram: http://instagram.com/zacksjerryrig
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1U4bQqv
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ZacksJerryRig

LARGE tool kit: http://amzn.to/2DURcr7
Travel Tool Kit: https://amzn.to/30LKXOY
Green Pry tool: http://amzn.to/1Tu57pI
Metal phone opening tool: http://amzn.to/1WdOFv0
Replacement phone parts: https://www.fixez.com/?utm_source=JerryRigEverything&utm_medium=homepage&utm_campaign=JerryRigEverything

The camera I used to film this video: http://amzn.to/2p7GtkX
The Lens I used for this video: http://amzn.to/1QOXDw2
Wide angle lens: http://amzn.to/2qiYM4u

The OneFootball x 442oons show is back with 6 ways to fix Liverpool! After losing 4-1 to Man City, Jurgen Klopp calls on Man United's Harry Maguire for some defensive advice, makes plans to move Fabinho and Henderson back into midfield, tries to get Salah, Mane and Firmino firing again, plus hatches a plan to bring the fans back to Anfield! snippet.title: Emanet 112. BΟΕlΟΦm | Legacy Episode 112
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherβÄôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewβÄΠ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleβÄôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KΡ±rΡ±mlΡ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong βÄ™ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, βÄ€Godzilla vs. Kong,βÄù the next epic adventure in LegendaryβÄôs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in βÄ€Godzilla vs. KongβÄù as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansβÄîinstigated by unseen forcesβÄîis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgΟΞrd (βÄ€Big Little Lies,βÄù βÄ€The Little Drummer GirlβÄù), Millie Bobby Brown (βÄ€Stranger ThingsβÄù), Rebecca Hall (βÄ€Christine,βÄù βÄ€Professor Marston and the Wonder WomenβÄù), Brian Tyree Henry (βÄ€Joker,βÄù βÄ€Spider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseβÄù), Shun Oguri (βÄ€Weathering with YouβÄù), Eiza GonzΟΓlez (βÄ€Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawβÄù), Julian Dennison (βÄ€Deadpool 2βÄù), with Kyle Chandler (βÄ€Godzilla: King of the MonstersβÄù) and DemiΟΓn Bichir (βÄ€The Nun,βÄù βÄ€The Hateful EightβÄù).
Wingard (βÄ€The Guest,βÄù βÄ€YouβÄôre NextβÄù) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (βÄ€Thor: RagnarokβÄù) and Max Borenstein (βÄ€Godzilla: King of the Monsters,βÄù βÄ€Kong: Skull IslandβÄù), story by Terry Rossio (βÄ€Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesβÄù) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (βÄ€Godzilla: King of the MonstersβÄù), based on the character βÄ€GodzillaβÄù owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorβÄôs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (βÄ€The Mummy,βÄù βÄ€World War ZβÄù), production designers Owen Paterson (βÄ€Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,βÄù βÄ€GodzillaβÄù) and Thomas S. Hammock (βÄ€Blair WitchβÄù), editor Josh Schaeffer (βÄ€Godzilla: King of the MonstersβÄù), costume designer Ann Foley (βÄ€SkyscraperβÄù) and visual effects supervisor John βÄ€DJβÄù DesJardin (upcoming βÄ€Zack SnyderβÄôs Justice LeagueβÄù).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, βÄ€Godzilla vs. Kong.βÄù  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Yemin 310. BΟΕlΟΦm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 310
snippet.description:
Yemin 310. BΟΕlΟΦm Ο•zeti:

Feride Οßok zor durumdadΡ±rβÄΠ Emir, SeyfiβÄôyi sΡ±kΡ±≈ütΡ±rΡ±p her ≈üeyi ΟΕΡürenir. Feride o adamΡ±n karΡ±sΡ± olacaktΡ±r. Seyfi, EmirβÄôi vazgeΟßirmeye ΟßalΡ±≈üΡ±r, adamlar Οßok tehlikelidir ve FerideβÄônin de EmirβÄôin de hayatΡ± tehlike girecektir. Emir dinlemez ve FerideβÄônin pe≈üinden gider. Feride ise kendini korurken biz kaza olur ve adam yaralanΡ±r. Emir de tam zamanΡ±nda yeti≈ümi≈ütir. Emir, FerideβÄôyi oradan kurtarΡ±r ama adamlar pe≈ülerindedir. AdamΡ±n ΟΕldΟΦΡüΟΦnΟΦ dΟΦ≈üΟΦnen Feride dayanamaz ve polise gider. Feride gerΟßekten katil mi oldu? Kumru, bebeΡüinin katili olarak NarinβÄôi ihbar etmi≈ütir. Narin mahkemeye ΟßΡ±kar ve beraat edince derin bir nefes alΡ±rlar. Kumru ise cezasΡ±nΡ± bulmu≈ü akΡ±l hastanesine yatΡ±rΡ±lmΡ±≈ütΡ±r. ≈ûimdi kΟΕtΟΦ gΟΦnler KumruβÄôyu beklemektedir. Narin ile Kemal ise sonunda kavu≈üabilecekler mi?

Abone olun / Subscribe / SuscrΟ≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

Narin mahkemeye ΟßΡ±kar ve beraat edince derin bir nefes alΡ±rlar. Kumru ise cezasΡ±nΡ± bulmu≈ü akΡ±l hastanesine yatΡ±rΡ±lmΡ±≈ütΡ±r. ≈ûimdi kΟΕtΟΦ gΟΦnler KumruβÄôyu beklemektedir. When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

AliβÄôden hesap sorar ve AsenaβÄônΡ±n yaptΡ±klarΡ±nΡ± anlatmasΡ±nΡ± ister. NilgΟΦn ise kΡ±zΡ±na hΡ±rsΡ±z imasΡ± yapΡ±lmasΡ±ndan son derece rahatsΡ±zdΡ±r.  ΡΑhsanβÄôla konu≈ümak iΟßin ofisin yolunu tutar.
BurakβÄôΡ±n babasΡ±, sunduΡüu maddi imkanlarΡ± kesince Burak parasΡ±zlΡ±kla kar≈üΡ± kar≈üΡ±ya kalΡ±r.

kulak misafiri olur. Burak ve Biricik, Serra konusunda tartΡ±≈üΡ±r. Burak, BiricikβÄôe Serra
yenilgisini kabul etmesini sΟΕylerken, kendisi de bu entrikalardan 
yava≈ü yava≈ü sΡ±kΡ±lmaya ba≈üladΡ±ΡüΡ±nΡ± hissettirir.  

GerΟßeΡüi ΟΕΡürenen Selim suΟßluluk duygusuyla peri≈üan olur. SerraβÄôya kendini affettirmek iΟßin 
var gΟΦcΟΦyle ΟßabalayΡ±p ΟΕfkesini yatΡ±≈ütΡ±rmaya ΟßalΡ±≈üΡ±r ancak Serra kendisine yapΡ±lmΡ±≈ü bu hakareti kabullenemez.

snippet.title: Son Yaz 6. BΟΕlΟΦm 2. FragmanΡ± | Uzak Kalabilir Misin?
snippet.description:
Son Yaz 6. BΟΕlΟΦm 2. FragmanΡ± | Uzak Kalabilir Misin?

Canan, AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦn gerΟßek kimliΡüini ΟΕΡürenmi≈ütir ve SelimβÄôe Οßok kΡ±zgΡ±ndΡ±r. Selim ve AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦn gitmesini talep eden Canan, onlar gidene kadar Οßocuklarla beraber EmelβÄôlere yerle≈üir. Selim, bir yandan CananβÄôΡ±n bo≈üanmak iΟßin tekrar harekete geΟßmesi, diΡüer yandan yaptΡ±ΡüΡ± operasyonun ba≈üarΡ±sΡ±z olmasΡ± yΟΦzΟΦnden Οßok gergindir. Selim ba≈üarΡ±sΡ±z operasyonu tersine Οßevirmek iΟßin baskΡ±n yaptΡ±ΡüΡ± uyu≈üturucunun pe≈üine dΟΦ≈üer, AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦn de yardΡ±mΡ±nΡ± ister.  AkgΟΦn ise SonerβÄôin sΡ±kΡ±≈ütΡ±rmasΡ±yla LatifβÄôin yerini ΟΕΡürenmek ve SelimβÄôin olanlarΡ± ortaya ΟßΡ±karmasΡ±nΡ± engellemek zorundadΡ±r. YaΡümur, AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦn kendisini ΟΕpmeye kalkmasΡ±nΡ± aklΡ±ndan ΟßΡ±karmaya ΟßalΡ±≈üΡ±rken aynΡ± zamanda AkgΟΦnβÄôden uzak durmaya ΟßalΡ±≈üΡ±r.  Ama AltayβÄôΡ±n annesinin kararΡ±ndan sonra kΟΕtΟΦ etkilenip ortadan kaybolmasΡ± onu, yeniden AkgΟΦnβÄôle yan yana getirir. 

ΡΑdealist Cumhuriyet SavcΡ±sΡ± Selim Kara (Ali Atay), 8 yΡ±l ΟΕnce hapse yolladΡ±ΡüΡ± organize suΟß lideri SelΟßuk Ta≈ükΡ±nβÄôdan (Arif Pi≈ükin) reddedemeyeceΡüi bir teklif alΡ±r. SelΟßuk Ta≈ükΡ±n, SavcΡ± Selim KaraβÄônΡ±n bΟΦtΟΦn suΟß ΟΕrgΟΦtΟΦnΟΦ ΟßΟΕkertecek davasΡ±nda, tanΡ±klΡ±k yapmayΡ± istemektedir. Ancak bunun iΟßin tek bir ≈üartΡ± vardΡ±r; oΡülu AkgΟΦn GΟΕkalp Ta≈ükΡ±nβÄôΡ± (Alperen Duymaz) Selim KaraβÄônΡ±n bizzat korumasΡ±βÄΠ SuΟß dΟΦnyasΡ± iΟßinde bΟΦyΟΦmΟΦ≈ü, tehlikeli ve sorunlu gΟΕrΟΦnΟΦmΟΦnΟΦn ardΡ±nda duygusal bir genΟß olan AkgΟΦn iΟßin bu kabul edilmesi gΟΦΟß bir durumdur. Hayat beklemediΡüi bir yerden daha sΡ±nar SelimβÄôi; ΡΑzmirβÄôde ΟßocuklarΡ± ile ya≈üayan e≈üi Canan (Funda EryiΡüit) bo≈üanmak istemektedir. Ailesi ile i≈üi arasΡ±nda kalan SavcΡ± Kara, ba≈ü belasΡ± olarak gΟΕrdΟΦΡüΟΦ AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦ ailesinin yanΡ±na ΡΑzmir Ο΅e≈ümeβÄôde bulunan Adalet SitesiβÄône gΟΕtΟΦrmek zorunda kalΡ±r. SelimβÄôin beklenmeyen misafiri AkgΟΦnβÄôΟΦn geli≈üi site sakinlerinin tΟΦm dengelerini altΟΦst edecek; EgeβÄôde ba≈ülayan bu rΟΦzgΟΔr, herkesin hayatΡ±nΡ± deΡüi≈ütirecek bΟΦyΟΦk bir fΡ±rtΡ±naya dΟΕnΟΦ≈üecektir.

OYUNCULAR: ALPEREN DUYMAZ, ALΡΑ ATAY, FUNDA ERYΡΑΡûΡΑT, HAFSANUR SANCAKTUTAN, EMRE KARAYEL, SΡΑNAN TUZCU, ≈ûEBNEM DΟ•NMEZ, ARΡΑF PΡΑ≈ûKΡΑN, SEZER KOΟ΅, HALΡΑL BABΟ€R, YASEMΡΑN YAZICI, ERDEM ≈ûANLI, YUNUS NARΡΑN, ATA NEDΡΑM ARMAN, SARP ΡΑKΡΑLER, CENGΡΑZ OKUYUCU

snippet.title: I am so confused.
snippet.description:
Schlatt wonders why his last video got 80,000 comments.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Truly disgusting, that some people would do this horrible thing. Why? Why did you comment this? Are you part of the problem? No, I'll tell you what the problem is. The problem is that TommyInnit and the Dream SMP are getting more viewers than me even though I'm so much cooler than everyone else on it (like Ranboo, Awesamdude, Karl Jacobs, and others whose names I forgot). Tubbo is pretty cool I guess though. Schlatt talks about why his latest video got 80,000 comments, which is insane and almost seems like algorithm manipulation (CC: Spiffing Brit). Almost as bad as the algorithm manipulation that writing these meaningless paragraphs contributes to. But hey I'm in it for the money. ToaLegend makes an appearance as well, with his hit classic "Nibble" which will now get millions of comments I bet. Please be nice.

snippet.title: Uz Velju Nevolju uhapsite i Vazuru! Ub**jali na stadionu, to je osnovana sumnja - Milan DumanoviΡ΅
snippet.description:
Povodom hap≈Γenja Veljka Belivuka i njegove grupe, za Srbin.info je govorio Milan DumanoviΡ΅, biv≈Γi operativac UKP MUP-a Srbije i jedan od osnivaΡça Pokreta OsloboΡëenje. DumanoviΡ΅ otkriva stvari koje ≈Γiroj javnosti do sada nisu bili poznate, kao i ko bi jo≈Γ po njegovim saznanjima morao da bude uhap≈Γen zbog zloΡçina grupe Velje Nevolje.


"Na ovu borbu protiv kriminala je VuΡçiΡ΅ nateran od strane drugih kriminalaca koji treba da doΡëu, a nisu ≈Ψeleli da imaju protiv sebe ovako brutalnu grupu, koja je terorisala graΡëane Srbije godinama. Ρ¨estitam ljudima u Upravi kriminalistiΡçke policije koja sve zna ≈Γta se radi pa i da sada neko nije naredio ovu akciju, policija bi sama odreagovala jer tamo jo≈Γ ima Ρçasnih policajaca kojima je do≈Γlo do grla. Pozivam tu≈Ψioca Mladena NenadiΡ΅a da pro≈Γiri isragu i nastavi jer je ova grupa radila pet godina pod pla≈Γtom Srpske napredne stranke. Da NenadiΡ΅ obrati pa≈Ψnju i na pripadnike politike, vojske, BIA, MUP koji su se grlili i ljubili sa Veljom Nevoljom. Pozivam da to uradi i Sektor unutra≈Γnje kontrole i procesuira ta lica. HrkaloviΡ΅ je sve vreme bila sa ovom ekipom i upoznata je sa njihovim najte≈Ψim kriviΡçnim delima za koja je predviΡëena kazna 40 godina zatvora". 


DumanoviΡ΅ smatra da bi obavezno trebalo procesuirati kao saradnike Velje Nevolje i Upravu FK Partizan.



"Pozivam NenadiΡ΅a da hitno procesuira najbitnije ljude iz FK Partizan, da se privede Milo≈Γ Vazura koji je dobar sa VuΡçiΡ΅em kao i kompletna Uprava Partizana jer je morala da zna ≈Γta se de≈Γavalo u njihovim prostorijama i to da se procesuiraju kao sauΡçesnici Velje Nevolje. Da se ja pitam, klub bi bio zatvoren na nekoliko godina dok se sva kriviΡçna dela u klubu ne ispitaju. Ceo stadion i kompleks su pokriveni kamerana i sve su znali ljudi iz Uprave. Zbog ove kriminalne grupe mora da bude procesuirano minimum 100 lica samo u Beogradu, a ne samo 17 kao do sada. Za dela ove grupe koja je radila ≈Γta je htela u ovoj dr≈Ψavi znali su i Aleksandar i Andrej VuΡçiΡ΅ i Gli≈ΓiΡ΅ iz SNS, naravno i Dijana HrkaloviΡ΅", nagla≈Γava biv≈Γi operativac UKP.


DumanoviΡ΅ ima posebnu poruku za predsednika Srbije Aleksandra VuΡçiΡ΅a:



"Vulin je nebitna liΡçnost, ovo hap≈Γenje je izvr≈Γeno jer je VuΡçiΡ΅ dobio nareΡëenje od nekog drugog. Svi koji stoje iza Vulina danas, za mene su kriminalci iako nisu u rangu kao Belivuk. Jo≈Γ 2016. godine smo upozoravali na Dijanu HrkaloviΡ΅, a Mladen TrboviΡ΅ je tada upozorio VuΡçiΡ΅a o tome tako da je on sve vreme znao ≈Γta rade i jasno da je on odgovoran za ovu grupu. Uprava kriminalistiΡçke policije zna sve o svakom i o VuΡçiΡ΅u, i o Vulinu, svi Ρ΅e oni biti procesuirani kad doΡëe vreme jer su znali za izvr≈Γnje najte≈Ψih kriviΡçnih dela. Belivuk je danas prvo bio na razgovoru u BIA, to je prvi put da ta agencija dobije ekskluztivno pravo da prva ispituje kriminalca tog ranga umesto policije. HrkaloviΡ΅ka je kod VuΡçiΡ΅a pu≈Γtena niz vodu i sigurno Ρ΅e biti uhap≈Γena, ali tu je jo≈Γ 10 lica uz vrha policije koji takoΡëe moraju biti uhap≈Γeni. Ovi kriminlaci danas uhap≈Γeni su imali slu≈Ψbene legitimacije! Vrh policije im je to obezbedio. Zato su bili tako bahati i bezobrazni. VuΡçiΡ΅ Ρ΅e poku≈Γati da Belivuka zameni sa grupama iz Valjeva i ≈†apca, to su ljudi koji zvaniΡçno imaju svoje pokrete iako su ustvari kriminalci. GledaΡ΅e ovaj video VuΡçiΡ΅, pa neka vidi da znamo koga misli da dovede umesto Belivuka. Oni ne mogu da budu tako jaki u Beogradu i zbog ovog hap≈Γenja VuΡçiΡ΅ gubi jer je morao da procesuira jaku ekipu koja je bila uz njega, a po zloΡçinima su bili gori od Zemunskog klana i delovali su ≈Γirom  Balkana. Ovim hap≈Γenjem je sada obezglavljen kavaΡçki klan u Beogradu", istiΡçe DumanoviΡ΅.



#MilanDumanoviΡ΅ #VeljaNevolja #SRBINinfo

Stavovi izneti u emisiji nisu nu≈Ψno stavovi redakcije i novinara medijske kuΡ΅e SRBIN.info, a sve one koji se osete prozvanim ovim video materijalom, pozivamo da nam se obrate na mejl: kontakt@srbin.info i/ili press@srbin.info.

Pozivam tu≈Ψioca Mladena NenadiΡ΅a da pro≈Γiri isragu i nastavi jer je ova grupa radila pet godina pod pla≈Γtom Srpske napredne stranke. Da NenadiΡ΅ obrati pa≈Ψnju i na pripadnike politike, vojske, BIA, MUP koji su se grlili i ljubili sa Veljom Nevoljom. Pozivam da to uradi i Sektor unutra≈Γnje kontrole i procesuira ta lica. HrkaloviΡ΅ je sve vreme bila sa ovom ekipom i upoznata je sa njihovim najte≈Ψim kriviΡçnim delima za koja je predviΡëena kazna 40 godina zatvora". 


DumanoviΡ΅ smatra da bi obavezno trebalo procesuirati kao saradnike Velje Nevolje i Upravu FK Partizan.



"Pozivam NenadiΡ΅a da hitno procesuira najbitnije ljude iz FK Partizan, da se privede Milo≈Γ Vazura koji je dobar sa VuΡçiΡ΅em kao i kompletna Uprava Partizana jer je morala da zna ≈Γta se de≈Γavalo u njihovim prostorijama i to da se procesuiraju kao sauΡçesnici Velje Nevolje. Da se ja pitam, klub bi bio zatvoren na nekoliko godina dok se sva kriviΡçna dela u klubu ne ispitaju. Ceo stadion i kompleks su pokriveni kamerana i sve su znali ljudi iz Uprave. Zbog ove kriminalne grupe mora da bude procesuirano minimum 100 lica samo u Beogradu, a ne samo 17 kao do sada. Za dela ove grupe koja je radila ≈Γta je htela u ovoj dr≈Ψavi znali su i Aleksandar i Andrej VuΡçiΡ΅ i Gli≈ΓiΡ΅ iz SNS, naravno i Dijana HrkaloviΡ΅", nagla≈Γava biv≈Γi operativac UKP.


DumanoviΡ΅ ima posebnu poruku za predsednika Srbije Aleksandra VuΡçiΡ΅a:



"Vulin je nebitna liΡçnost, ovo hap≈Γenje je izvr≈Γeno jer je VuΡçiΡ΅ dobio nareΡëenje od nekog drugog. Svi koji stoje iza Vulina danas, za mene su kriminalci iako nisu u rangu kao Belivuk. Jo≈Γ 2016. godine smo upozoravali na Dijanu HrkaloviΡ΅, a Mladen TrboviΡ΅ je tada upozorio VuΡçiΡ΅a o tome tako da je on sve vreme znao ≈Γta rade i jasno da je on odgovoran za ovu grupu. Uprava kriminalistiΡçke policije zna sve o svakom i o VuΡçiΡ΅u, i o Vulinu, svi Ρ΅e oni biti procesuirani kad doΡëe vreme jer su znali za izvr≈Γnje najte≈Ψih kriviΡçnih dela. Belivuk je danas prvo bio na razgovoru u BIA, to je prvi put da ta agencija dobije ekskluztivno pravo da prva ispituje kriminalca tog ranga umesto policije. HrkaloviΡ΅ka je kod VuΡçiΡ΅a pu≈Γtena niz vodu i sigurno Ρ΅e biti uhap≈Γena, ali tu je jo≈Γ 10 lica uz vrha policije koji takoΡëe moraju biti uhap≈Γeni. Ovi kriminlaci danas uhap≈Γeni su imali slu≈Ψbene legitimacije! Vrh policije im je to obezbedio. Zato su bili tako bahati i bezobrazni. VuΡçiΡ΅ Ρ΅e poku≈Γati da Belivuka zameni sa grupama iz Valjeva i ≈†apca, to su ljudi koji zvaniΡçno imaju svoje pokrete iako su ustvari kriminalci. GledaΡ΅e ovaj video VuΡçiΡ΅, pa neka vidi da znamo koga misli da dovede umesto Belivuka. Oni ne mogu da budu tako jaki u Beogradu i zbog ovog hap≈Γenja VuΡçiΡ΅ gubi jer je morao da procesuira jaku ekipu koja je bila uz njega, a po zloΡçinima su bili gori od Zemunskog klana i delovali su ≈Γirom  Balkana. Ovim hap≈Γenjem je sada obezglavljen kavaΡçki klan u Beogradu", istiΡçe DumanoviΡ΅.



#MilanDumanoviΡ΅ #VeljaNevolja #SRBINinfo

Stavovi izneti u emisiji nisu nu≈Ψno stavovi redakcije i novinara medijske kuΡ΅e SRBIN.info, a sve one koji se osete prozvanim ovim video materijalom, pozivamo da nam se obrate na mejl: kontakt@srbin.info i/ili press@srbin.info.
